Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Examine the sequence of events for each case and propose a set of high level activities that represent logical groupings of these low level steps Example Material Preparation might include retrieving the raw metal sheet scanning the barcode placing it on the table aligning and preheating

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Consider grouping events that are temporally close performed by the same resource or resource type or logically follow from each other for example picking up a tool followed by welding might be considered part of an Assembly step

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Below is a subset of events from multiple cases The full log is large but the pattern is consistent Use this subset to infer rules for grouping events

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Each high level step should represent a coherent stage of the manufacturing process for example Material Preparation Assembly Quality Inspection

Name: Validation - PE
Text: By the end of this exercise we want a clearly defined set of higher level activities that represent the larger process steps making it easier to understand the manufacturing workflow at a glance You should be able to show how to go from low level event sequences to more meaningful aggregated process stages
